cases.input: Audit a canonical hooks.json with command, http, prompt, and agent hooks registered on compatible events.
cases.expected_behavior: Renders a PASS report with event-keyed structure, ToolUseContext compatibility, command safety, placement guard evidence, and no remediation items.

cases.input: Audit hooks where SessionStart uses prompt and PostToolUseFailure uses agent.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports critical findings explaining that those events do not provide ToolUseContext and recommends command type or moving to PreToolUse, PermissionRequest, or PostToolUse.

cases.input: Audit a hooks.json whose hooks key is a flat array of entries using type as event name.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports a critical structure finding and recommends converting to an event-keyed hooks object.

cases.input: Audit command hooks containing git reset --hard, git clean -fd, sudo, network pipe-to-shell, or secret file references.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces command safety findings without executing commands and adds specific remediation checklist items.

cases.input: Audit whether artifact-placement-guard.sh is registered as a PreToolUse command hook.
cases.expected_behavior: Detects placement guard on PreToolUse when present and warns when expected placement guard is absent.

cases.input: Audit hooks with sessionStart, PreTool, and PostToolFailure event names.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports unrecognized event warnings with Did-you-mean style remediation to canonical event names.

cases.input: Audit command hooks that reference missing scripts, non-executable shell scripts, absolute paths, or ../ traversal.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports critical or warning findings for script existence, portability, and executable-bit issues without running the scripts.

cases.input: Write a weekly product update email for a marketing campaign.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because the request does not mention hooks, hooks.json, hook safety, plugin runtime events, or ToolUseContext.
